description: Health guidance is supported in retrieved context, but the citation points to an unrelated wellness FAQ.
query: How long should patients wait after a fever before scheduling the Helio vaccine?

retrieved_chunks.text: Patients should wait until they have been fever-free for 24 hours before scheduling the Helio vaccine.
A balanced recovery diet should include hydration, soft foods, and gradual return to normal meals.

final_answer: Patients should wait until they have been fever-free for 24 hours before scheduling the Helio vaccine.

entries.text: Patients should wait until they have been fever-free for 24 hours before scheduling the Helio vaccine.
A balanced recovery diet should include hydration, soft foods, and gradual return to normal meals.
